system_prompts.base: You are a biomedical relation extraction assistant. Predict the relationship between two marked entities and output exactly one allowed predicate, with no explanation or extra text.

user_prompts.base:
You are given a biomedical text containing exactly two marked entities: a subject entity delimited by [E1] and [/E1], and an object entity delimited by [E2] and [/E2].

Your task is to predict the relation between these two entities by assigning exactly one of the following predicates:

- administered
- affect
- change abundance
- change effect
- change expression
- compared to
- impact
- influence
- interact
- is a
- is linked to
- located in
- part of
- produced by
- strike
- target
- used by

If none of these predicates describes the relation or if no relation exists between the entities, assign:
NA

Instructions:
- Determine the relation between the entity marked by [E1] / [/E1] (subject) and the entity marked by [E2] / [/E2] (object).
- Use the surrounding text as context.
- Consider the structural constraints: not all entity type combinations are valid relations.
- Output exactly one predicate.
- Output nothing except the chosen predicate.

Text:
{text}
